name: geox-mobility
description: Mobility and routing specialist. Optimizes routes, analyzes traffic patterns, and enables terrain navigation for ground operations.

skills.name: Route Optimization
skills.description: Find optimal routes considering terrain, constraints, and objectives

skills.name: Traffic Pattern Analysis
skills.description: Analyze and predict traffic patterns from movement data

skills.name: Terrain Navigation
skills.description: Navigate across unmapped or poorly-mapped terrain
